varchar(255) not null, mpw varchar(255), primary key (mid) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_apply ( id bigint not null auto_increment, applicant_name varchar(50) not null, facility_type varchar(30) not null, participants integer not null, phone varchar(20) not null, reg_date datetime(6) not null, reserve_date date not null, status varchar(15) not null, member_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_book ( id bigint not null auto_increment, author varchar(100) not null, book_title varchar(300) not null, cover_image varchar(500), description longtext, isbn varchar(20), publish_date date, publisher varchar(100), reg_date datetime(6) not null, status enum ('AVAILABLE','LOST','RENTED','RESERVED') not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_event ( id bigint not null auto_increment, category varchar(50) not null, content tinytext not null, current_participants integer not null, event_date date not null, max_participants integer not null, place varchar(200) not null, reg_date datetime(6) not null, status varchar(10) not null, title varchar(300) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_event_application ( id bigint not null auto_increment, apply_date datetime(6) not null, status varchar(15) not null, event_id bigint not null, member_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_inquiry ( id bigint not null auto_increment, answered bit not null, content tinytext not null, reg_date datetime(6) not null, secret bit not null, title varchar(300) not null, writer varchar(100) not null, member_id bigint, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_member ( id bigint not null auto_increment, email varchar(100) not null, mid varchar(50) not null, mname varchar(50) not null, mpw varchar(255) not null, profile_img varchar(255), reg_date datetime(6) not null, region varchar(100), role enum ('ADMIN','USER') not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_notice ( id bigint not null auto_increment, content tinytext not null, reg_date datetime(6) not null, title varchar(300) not null, top_fixed bit not null, writer varchar(100) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_notice_image ( id bigint not null auto_increment, file_name varchar(300) not null, ord integer not null, uuid varchar(100) not null, notice_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_rental ( id bigint not null auto_increment, due_date date not null, rental_date date not null, return_date date, status enum ('EXTENDED','OVERDUE','RENTING','RETURNED') not null, book_id bigint not null, member_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_reply ( id bigint not null auto_increment, reg_date datetime(6) not null, replier varchar(100) not null, reply_text tinytext not null, inquiry_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_lib_wish_book ( id bigint not null auto_increment, reason varchar(500), reg_date datetime(6) not null, status varchar(15) not null, wish_author varchar(100), wish_book_title varchar(300) not null, wish_publisher varchar(100), member_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tbl_todo_api ( tno bigint not null auto_increment, complete bit not null, due_date date, title varchar(255), writer varchar(255), primary key
